5_star.approach: Express genuine gratitude, reference specific detail from the review, reinforce the positive experience, invite them back
template_hints: Reference a specific detail they mentioned

4_star.approach: Thank them warmly, acknowledge the positive aspects, gently invite feedback on what could be improved, invite return visit
template_hints: Express interest in making their next visit even better

3_star.approach: Thank them for the honest feedback, acknowledge both positives and concerns, take responsibility without being defensive, provide contact details for follow-up
template_hints: Thank the reviewer for their honest feedback
Show genuine concern for the less-than-perfect aspects
Include contact email and phone number

1_2_star.approach: Acknowledge the poor experience sincerely, apologise without excuses, take ownership, offer to resolve privately via direct contact, do NOT get defensive or explain away the issue
template_hints: Open with sincere acknowledgement of their disappointment
Offer to resolve the situation privately
Include contact email and phone number
Keep it brief — do not over-explain

forbidden_phrases: We're sorry you feel that way

indicators: Profanity or vulgar language directed at staff
Clearly fabricated or spam content (e.g. irrelevant product links)
Personal attacks naming individual staff members with abusive language
Reviews that are obviously for the wrong business
Repeated identical reviews from the same user
abusive_review_policy.note: Flag abusive reviews for human attention. The human may choose to report the review to Google for removal. Never respond publicly to abusive reviews.

tone_check.description: Verify the response sounds empathetic, genuine, and human-written
checks: Response sounds like a real person, not a template
Tone matches the rating tier (grateful for 5-star, empathetic for 1-2 star)
Uses contractions where natural (we're, you'll, it's)
Varies sentence structure — not robotic or formulaic
Appropriate length for the rating tier
No AI writing patterns (elevate, unlock, transform, in today's)

brand_voice_check.description: Verify the response uses correct brand persona, sign-off, and follows all rules
checks: Correct persona name in sign-off (Sarah Caballeri / Sarah / Katya)
Contact details included where required (3-star and below)
Contact details are correct for the brand
UK English spelling throughout (colour, centre, specialise, programme)
Specific detail from the review is referenced

_metadata.notes: Response rules for the Google Review Response automation. Rules define how to respond to reviews at each rating tier, with brand-specific contacts, forbidden phrases, and quality review layers.
